f0d6ba4892b6.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
f0d6ba4892b6.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
f0d6ba4892b6.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

1e6611cbf45f.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
1e6611cbf45f.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

66dbf92a1a2b.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
66dbf92a1a2b.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
66dbf92a1a2b.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

9a6dcafd78e4.title: Ranked #6 of 6 locally — peers are ahead
9a6dcafd78e4.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

cd19c1a9e88f.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
cd19c1a9e88f.description: At 184 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
